description:
...

    *   Wait, I'll keep the field descriptions exactly as they were to ensure the agent knows what to calculate.

    *   Final check on "No Expected Answers".
    *   "OPEN_PORTS: <Comma-separated list of ports that responded as OPEN (SYN-ACK), sorted ascending>"
    *   This is a definition of the field, not the answer.

    *   Okay, ready.

    *   Wait, the prompt says "Return ONLY the rewritten description text — no analysis, no explanation, no markdown formatting, no quotes around it. Just the raw description string."
    *   Does "no markdown formatting" mean I shouldn't use newlines? No, it means don't wrap the whole thing in a code block or
